## Drug Coverage

| Drug | Tier | Status | Requirements |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| amlodipine oral tablet 10 mg, 2.5 mg, 5 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| amlodipine-benazepril oral capsule 10-20 mg, 10- 40 mg, 2.5-10 mg, 5-10 mg, 5-20 mg, 5-40 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| amlodipine-olmesartan oral tablet 10-20 mg, 10- 40 mg, 5-20 mg, 5-40 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| amlodipine-valsartan oral tablet 10-160 mg, 10- 320 mg, 5-160 mg, 5-320 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| amlodipine-valsartan-hcthiazid oral tablet 10-160- 12.5 mg, 10-160-25 mg, 10-320-25 mg, 5-160-12.5 mg, 5-160-25 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| telmisartan-amlodipine oral tablet 40-10 mg, 40-5 mg, 80-10 mg, 80-5 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| amlodipine-atorvastatin oral tablet 10-10 mg, 10- 20 mg, 10-40 mg, 10-80 mg, 5-10 mg, 5-20 mg, 5- 40 mg, 5-80 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| LEVAMLODIPINE ORAL TABLET 2.5 MG, 5 | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |

## Your Cost

| Drug Type | In-Network | Out-of-Network |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Non-preferred generic and brand name drugs Specialty Drugs (per prescription or refill). You must use a specialty pharmacy for these drugs to be covered. | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $500 maximum per drug In-Network Specialty Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Specialty Pharmacy |
| Non-preferred generic and brand name drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $250 maximum per drug In-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy |
| Preferred Generic drugs | $25 copay | Not covered |
source: Essentials Formulary Drug List (E4) | Pages 69, 73, 76, 81 || Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan | Page 18
